text: I feel a sense of curiosity and excitement being in this modern, thoughtfully designed exhibition space. The bold, colorful graphics on the wall and the displays about "R+D" (Research and Development) suggest a place dedicated to innovation and the exploration of new ideas. There is a quiet hum of intellectual energy, and I feel drawn to engage, to read, to think deeply about the relationship between humans and technology that is being showcased here. The slightly tilted perspective even adds to a feeling of dynamic change, of things in motion.
